afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_RISK_ETA_HEADWIND_MULT
afterSnapshot.description: Multiplier applied to the ETA-uncertainty drift for headwind legs (the constant-speed assumption is least reliable into the wind). 1 = no extra penalty.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Headwind legs make ETA less reliable; this scales the drift penalty.
implementation: Config-driven like the other route warning thresholds so it is tunable without code changes.
